content:
I've completed a thorough exploration of the entire xunjianbao project. Here is the complete structural report:

---

## 1. FRONTEND STRUCTURE (`/Users/fanxing/xunjianbao/frontend/src/`)

### 1.1 Route Definitions (`router.tsx`)
- Uses `react-router-dom` with `createBrowserRouter` and lazy loading via `Suspense`
- All routes wrapped in `Layout` component (except `/login`)
- **7 primary route groups** mapping to 7 lazy-loaded pages:

| Path(s) | Component | Module |
|---------|-----------|--------|
| `/`, `/center`, `/monitor`, `/dashboard` | `Center` | 监控中枢 |
| `/media`, `/media-library`, `/gallery`, `/reports` | `Media` | 媒体库 |
| `/alerts` | `AlertsWorkspace` | 告警处置 |
| `/tasks` | `TasksWorkspace` | 任务协同 |
| `/assets`, `/sensors` | `AssetsWorkspace` | 资产设备 |
| `/openclaw`, `/ai`, `/command` | `OpenClawWorkspace` | 智能协同 |
| `/system`, `/settings`, `/admin` | `SystemWorkspace` | 系统管理 |
| `*` | Redirect to `/center` | — |
| `/login` | `Login` (no Layout) | — |

### 1.2 Navigation System (`config/navigation.ts`)
Defines 7 `NavigationModule` items with `id`, `label`, `description`, `path`, `aliases`, `icon` (lucide-react icons: `Radar`, `FolderKanban`, `Siren`, `ClipboardList`, `ServerCog`, `Bot`, `ShieldCheck`).

### 1.3 Layout Component (`components/Layout.tsx`)
- **Left sidebar**: icon rail (64px) with navigation, theme toggle
- **Header**: module title, status pill, alert count, "打开智能协同" button, Cmd/Ctrl+K shortcut
- **OpenClawPanel**: global AI assistant panel (right slide-out) with mock responses, quick suggestions per module
- Uses `framer-motion` for animated active indicators
- Listens to `OPENCLAW_COMPOSE_EVENT` custom event for cross-component AI integration

### 1.4 Key Route Pages (Full Content Summaries)

**Center.tsx (550 lines)** — 监控中枢
- Unified video wall with stream grid (`StreamGrid` component)
- Filter by: all/drone/general camera
- Layout options: 1x1, 2x2, 3x3, 4x4, auto
- Stream list sidebar with status, signal, tags
- Right panel: selected stream details, related alerts, media, tasks
- Immersive mode (fullscreen overlay)
- `ContextActionStrip` for OpenClaw AI actions (研判画面/追溯资料/发布任务)
- All data from `workspaceMock` (mock data)

**Media.tsx (287 lines)** — 媒体库
- Two modes: 资料目录模式 (library) / 取证回看模式 (evidence)
- Grid of media items with kind tags (录像/截图/报告/缺陷记录)
- Right panel: selected item detail, related stream, related alerts, smart actions
- `ContextActionStrip` for AI actions (自然语言检索/生成取证说明/加入报告草稿)
- Metric tiles: folder count, total items, evidence links

**OpenClawWorkspace.tsx (201 lines)** — 智能协同
- Lists `openClawMissions` (cross-module task orchestrations)
- Lists `automationTemplates` (离线后自动追溯, 值班交接摘要, 高危告警资料包)
- Metric tiles: mission count, template count, module count (7)
- Right panel: mission details, knowledge/command entry points (解释上下文/生成摘要/规划工作流/整理记录)

### 1.5 Type Definitions (`types/`)

**API Types** (`types/api/`):
- `response.ts`: `ApiResponse<T>`, `PaginatedResponse<T>`, `ApiError`, `PaginationParams`, `FilterParams`, `extractListData()`
- `streams.ts`: `Stream` (id, name, status, type, location, url, lat, lng, tenant_id), `StreamStatus` (online/offline/warning/error), `StreamType` (drone/camera/recording/rtsp/webrtc), `StreamStatistics`, `StreamLayout`
- `alerts.ts`: `Alert` (id, level, type, title, message, location, status, acknowledged, stream_id), `AlertLevel` (INFO/WARN/CRIT/OFFLINE), `AlertStatus` (pending/resolved/false_alarm), `AlertStatistics`
- `auth.ts`: `User` (id, username, email, avatar, role, tenant_id), `LoginRequest`, `LoginResponse`
- `sensors.ts`: `Sensor` (id, type, location, status, last_value, thresholds), `SensorData`
- `tasks.ts`: `Task` (id, title, type, status, assignee_id, stream_ids, due_date, priority)

**Store Types** (`types/store/`):
- `RootState` = `{ auth, alerts, streams }`
- Each has corresponding state interfaces with filter/pagination/loading

**Component Types** (`types/components/`):
- Card, Button, Input, DataCard, Panel, Badge, StatusIndicator, EmptyState, Skeleton props

**Workspace Mock Types** (`data/workspaceMock.ts`) — extensive mock data types:
- `WorkspaceStream` (includes kind, category, area, lastEvent, aiSummary, tags, signal)
- `WorkspaceAlert` (includes level: 紧急/高危/提示, status: 待处置/处理中/已归档, recommendation)
- `WorkspaceMediaItem` (includes kind: 录像/截图/报告/缺陷记录, folder, owner, sizeLabel)
- `WorkspaceTask` (includes priority: 紧急/高/中/低, sourceType: 画面/告警/资料/人工)
- `AssetDevice` (includes kind: 视频设备/无人机/环境传感/边缘主机, health, diagnosis)
- `OpenClawMission` (includes relatedModules)
- `AutomationTemplate`, `SystemPolicy`

### 1.6 API Services (`api/`)

**Core Client** (`api/client.ts`):
- `ApiClient` class with `get/post/put/delete/uploadFile` methods
- Base URL: `VITE_API_BASE_URL || 'http://localhost:8094' + '/api/v1'`
- JWT Bearer token auth (skipped in DEV mode)

**v1 API modules** (`api/v1/`):
- `ai.ts`, `alerts.ts`, `auth.ts`, `dashboard.ts`, `index.ts`, `oncall.ts`, `qa.ts`, `reports.ts`, `streams.ts`, `tenant-config.ts`

**Top-level API files**:
- `ai.ts`: `AIAnalysisRequest/Result`, `AIReportRequest/Result`, `AIChatRequest/Result` with streaming SSE support
- `media.ts`: `MediaFile`, `MediaFolder`, full CRUD for files/folders, permission management, download URLs

### 1.7 Redux Store (`store/`)
- **RTK Query**: `baseApi` with tagTypes: Alert, Stream, Sensor, Task, User, Report, Dashboard, TenantConfig
- **Legacy Slices**: `authSlice`, `alertSlice`, `streamSlice`
- **RTK Query API Slices**: `alertsApi`, `streamsApi`, `tasksApi`, `sensorsApi`, `dashboardApi`, `reportsApi`, `tenantConfigApi`, `authApi`

### 1.8 Component Library (`components/`)
- **`openclaw/`**: `OpenClawPanel` (chat UI), `ContextActionStrip` (action buttons), `openclawBridge` (event-based composition), `mockAssistant`
- **`stream/`**: `StreamGrid`, `VideoStreamPlayer`, `StreamList`, `LayoutSwitcher`
- **`workspace/`**: `WorkspacePrimitives` (MetricTile, SectionHeader, StatusPill, WorkspacePanel, WorkspaceTone), `Workbench`
- **`yolo/`**: `YOLOControls`, `YOLOOverlay`
- **`ui/`**: 21 files — custom UI components (Button, Card, Input, Toast, etc.) — NOT using a component library like MUI/AntD
- **`gallery/`**: gallery components

### 1.9 Hooks (`hooks/`)
15 custom hooks: `useAlerts`, `useAuth`, `useClickOutside`, `useDebounce`, `useDisclosure`, `useFetch`, `useInterval`, `useIsMounted`, `useLocalStorage`, `usePagination`, `usePrevious`, `useStreams`, `useToggle`, `useWebSocket`

---

## 2. BACKEND STRUCTURE (`/Users/fanxing/xunjianbao/backend/`)

### 2.1 Go Models (`internal/model/`) — 11 files

| Model | Table | Key Fields |
|-------|-------|------------|
| `User` | `users` | username, email, password_hash, role, tenant_id, is_active |
| `Stream` | `streams` | name, type(camera/drone/recording/rtsp/webrtc), status, url, location, lat/lng, reconnect_count, soft_delete |
| `Alert` | `alerts` | level(INFO/WARN/CRIT/OFFLINE), type, title, message, location, lat/lng, sensor_data, status(pending/resolved/false_alarm), stream_id |
| `Media` | `media` | filename, original_name, mime_type, size, path, url, folder_id, type(image/video/document), user_id |
| `MediaFolder` | `media_folders` | name, parent_id, user_id |
| `Task` | `tasks` | title, type(routine/emergency/custom), status(pending/in_progress/completed/cancelled), assignee_id, stream_ids(JSON), priority(P0-P3) |
| `Report` | `reports` | type(daily/weekly/monthly/custom), title, content(JSON), status(pending/ready/failed), file_url |
| `Sensor` | `sensors` | type(temp/humidity/pressure/gas/smoke), location, last_value, thresholds |
| `SensorData` | `sensor_data` | sensor_id, value, unit |
| `YOLODetection` | `yolo_detections` | stream_id, timestamp, objects(JSON), processing_time, confidence |
| `OnCallSchedule` | `oncall_schedules` | user_id, shift_start, shift_end, status |
| `OnCallReport` | `oncall_reports` | schedule_id, shift_summary, total/critical_alerts, avg_response_time |
| `QAKnowledgeBase` | `qa_knowledge_bases` | name, description, document_count |
| `QADocument` | `qa_documents` | knowledge_base_id, filename, file_url, status |
| `QAConversation` | `qa_conversations` | knowledge_base_ids(JSON), question, answer, confidence, feedback |
| `TenantConfig` | `tenant_configs` | tenant_name, logo, storage_quota/used, max_devices, AI config, notification settings, feature flags |

### 2.2 Backend Architecture
- **Layered**: Handler → Service → Model (GORM)
- **Handlers** (14 files): ai, alert, auth, dashboard, media, oncall, qa, report, sensor, stream, task, tenant_config, utils, websocket
- **Services** (15 files): matching handlers + auth_jwt, errors, websocket
- **Router**: Gin-based, `/api/v1` prefix
  - Public: `/auth/login`, `/auth/register`
  - Protected (JWT): user, dashboard, streams, alerts, reports, ai, oncall, qa, tenant, sensors, tasks, media
  - WebSocket: `/ws`
- **Middleware**: CORS, AuthMiddleware (JWT)

### 2.3 Database Migrations
- `001_create_tables.sql`: users, streams, alerts, reports, yolo_detections
- `002_seed_data.sql`: admin user, 4 sample streams, 3 sample alerts
- Uses SQLite (`xunjianbao.db` in backend root)

---

## 3. AI SERVICE (`/Users/fanxing/xunjianbao/ai-service/`)

### 3.1 FastAPI App (`app/main.py`) — Port 8095
**Endpoints:**
- `GET /health` — health check
- `POST /api/v1/detect` — YOLO detection by stream_id (proxies to yolo-service)
- `POST /api/v1/detect/image` — detection from uploaded image
- `POST /api/v1/detect/{stream_id}` — detection for specific stream
- `POST /api/v1/chat` — AI chat (OpenClaw integration)
- `POST /api/v1/analyze` — AI analysis (fire/intrusion/defect/equipment/environment/alert)
- `POST /api/v1/analyze-alert/{alert_id}` — analyze specific alert
- `POST /api/v1/diagnose-device/{device_id}` — diagnose device
- `POST /api/v1/reports/generate` — generate inspection report (daily/weekly/monthly/incident/inspection)
- `GET /api/v1/models` — list available AI models
- `GET /api/v1/inspection` — run AI inspection
- `GET /api/v1/predict/storage/{stream_id}` — storage prediction

### 3.2 Services (`app/services/`)
- `analysis_service.py` — AI analysis for fire, intrusion, defect, equipment, environment, alert
- `chat_service.py` — AI chat/conversation with OpenClaw
- `report_service.py` — inspection report generation
- `yolo_proxy.py` — proxy to yolo-service for detection

### 3.3 Schemas (`app/models/schemas.py`)
Defines Pydantic models: `AnalysisRequest/Response`, `ChatRequest/Response`, `DetectionRequest/Response`, `InspectionRequest/Response`, `ReportGenerateRequest/Response`, `ModelInfo`

---

## 4. YOLO SERVICE (`/Users/fanxing/xunjianbao/yolo-service/`) — Port 8097

### 4.1 FastAPI App (`app/main.py`)
**Endpoints:**
- `GET /health` — health check
- `GET /streams` — list active streams
- `POST /streams/start` — start RTSP stream processing
- `POST /streams/{stream_id}/stop` — stop stream
- `POST /detect` — single image detection (HTTP)
- `POST /detect/batch` — batch image detection
- `WebSocket /ws/{stream_id}` — real-time detection streaming

### 4.2 Detector (`app/detector.py`)
- `YOLODetector` class wrapping ultralytics YOLO
- `detect(frame)` — numpy array inference
- `detect_from_bytes(image_bytes)` — JPEG/PNG inference
- `get_annotated_frame()` — draw bounding boxes
- Color map for: person, vehicle, fire, blue_algae, intrusion

### 4.3 Models (`app/models.py`)
- `BBox` (normalized 0-1 coordinates)
- `Detection` (class_name, confidence, bbox)
- `DetectionMessage` (WebSocket message format)
- `StreamConfig` (stream_id, rtsp_url, webrtc_url, yolo_enabled, classes filter)
- `StreamStatus`, `YOLOConfig`, `HealthResponse`

### 4.4 WebSocket Manager (`app/websocket_manager.py`)
- Connection management per stream_id
- Real-time frame processing and detection broadcasting

---

## 5. KEY ARCHITECTURAL NOTES

1. **Mock-driven frontend**: All workspace pages use `workspaceMock.ts` data, not real API calls. The API services exist but the main workspace pages (Center, Media, OpenClawWorkspace, etc.) don't use them yet.

2. **No component library**: All UI components are custom-built (no MUI, AntD, etc.). Uses `lucide-react` for icons, `framer-motion` for animations, `tailwind` for styling.

3. **Dual API pattern**: Both legacy `apiClient` (class-based) and RTK Query coexist. Most workspace pages use mock data, while some older routes may use the API services.

4. **OpenClaw integration**: Event-based bridge pattern — `composeOpenClaw()` dispatches custom DOM events, `Layout` listens and triggers mock AI responses. The actual AI service (`/api/v1/chat`) has streaming SSE support ready.

5. **Multi-tenant**: All backend models have `tenant_id` field with indexing. Frontend types include tenant_id.

6. **Database**: Currently SQLite for development. Tables defined in migrations, but `media`, `sensors`, `sensor_data`, `tasks`, `media_folders`, `oncall_*`, `qa_*`, `tenant_configs` tables are referenced in models but NOT in the migration SQL (likely auto-migrated by GORM).

7. **Three-service architecture**: Go backend (8094) + Python AI service (8095) + YOLO service (8097), with the Go backend proxying AI requests to the Python service.
